lint.command: echo "Checkstyle in advisory mode (49962 pre-existing violations). Skipped as hard gate."

blockingIssues.description: Accounting decomposition is still not achieved: core business implementation remains concentrated in AccountingCoreEngine (6179+ lines), so focused services do not own domain logic.
Journal/settlement focused services still rely on inheritance/super delegation to monolithic engine methods rather than independent implementations.

Cross-module journal standardization is still incomplete: packing/factory posting path (AccountingFacade.postPackingJournal) continues to call createJournalEntry directly instead of createStandardJournal(JournalCreationRequest).
Supplier settlement compliance audit typing is still incomplete because AccountingComplianceAuditService settlement detection does not include SUP-* references.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen decomposition acceptance criteria: explicitly fail implementations that relocate monolith logic into renamed base/engine classes, and require focused services to own business logic (not super/delegate wrappers).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both deep-accounting-logic-migration and fix-accounting-decomposition-and-standardization still centralize logic in AccountingCoreEngine while focused services mostly delegate/inherit.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve .factory guidance conflict by explicitly allowing `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` updates for endpoint/contract changes while keeping mission infrastructure paths off-limits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Two independent fix-feature reviews observed contradictory instruction between off-limits `.factory` guidance and mandatory frontend handoff updates.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a required frontend-handoff DTO parity check step that compares documented contracts against source DTO/record wrapper shapes (e.g., PageResponse wrappers and nested records).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: accounting-frontend-handoff contracts required a dedicated fix feature because wrapper/placeholder mismatches were not caught by current verification steps.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For audit-classification fixes, require verification of all active audit pipelines (domain trail and compliance trail) to prevent partial-path fixes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-accounting-decomposition-and-standardization updated one audit classification path, but supplier settlement typing remained incorrect in AccountingComplianceAuditService.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a canonical deterministic fallback strategy for auto-settlement references/idempotency keys to avoid drift across service layers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-gst-settlement-reconciliation showed two fallback-generation layers using different fingerprints without a declared shared convention.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate decomposition-bypass observation reported separately by two reviewers (skills and conventions variants).
Duplicate .factory guidance-conflict observation repeated across two fix reviews.
